entries.firstPrompt: Add a --verbose / -v flag to the CLI that shows debug logging. Should work with all subcommands.
entries.summary: Added global --verbose/-v flag using commander preAction hook. Debug logging gated behind verbose flag across all subcommands.
entries.nativeSummary: Added global --verbose/-v flag using commander preAction hook. Debug logging gated behind verbose flag across all subcommands.
entries.lastPrompt: Add a --verbose / -v flag to the CLI that shows debug logging. Should work with all subcommands.

entries.firstPrompt: Set up a GitHub Actions CI pipeline. It should lint, type-check, test, and build on every PR. Use Node 24.
entries.summary: Set up GitHub Actions CI workflow with lint, type-check, test, and build steps on Node 24. Triggers on PRs and pushes to main.
entries.nativeSummary: Set up GitHub Actions CI workflow with lint, type-check, test, and build steps on Node 24. Triggers on PRs and pushes to main.
entries.lastPrompt: Set up a GitHub Actions CI pipeline. It should lint, type-check, test, and build on every PR. Use Node 24.
